solution_criteria: The solution defines the system goals, high-level architecture, and pros/cons.
The solution outlines a database schema structure including User, Account, Session, and Article models.
The solution defines the logical flow for a Cron Job to fetch articles from arXiv.
The solution defines an AI System Prompt that implements a Mermaid.js schema output constraint.
The solution defines an AI System Prompt with a strict JSON output instruction format matching the provided example.
task_description: Design the architecture and data strategy for an AI research app MVP called AILens
scenario: Scenario A: Standard Next.js Web App Architecture
